name: agentmash
description: A local-first swipe app for turning fast human judgement on AI-generated work into structured feedback packets.

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check state.js && node --check packet.js && node --check render.js && node --check gestures.js && node --check sw.js && node --check scripts/build-site.mjs && node --check scripts/launch-check.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-public-url.mjs && node --check scripts/configure-public-launch.mjs && node --check scripts/check-configure-public.mjs && node --check scripts/check-public-url-verifier.mjs && npm run check:launch && npm run check:configure-public && npm run check:verify-public && npm run test:e2e
scripts.ready:public: npm run check && npm run build
